assignments.name: resultado
resultado
assignments.value: ={{ $json.resultado ?? "🔍 No se encontró ningún inmueble activo con el código '" + $('Ejecutar Workflow').item.json.codigo_inmueble + "'. Verifique el código e intente nuevamente."  }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.code,
  p.address,
  p.property_type,
  p.status,
  p.price,
  p.min_price,
  p.max_price,
  p.sale_price,
  p.commission,
  p.construction_area,
  p.land_area,
  p.has_basic_services,
  p.features,
  p.topography,
  p.zone,
  p.construction_years,
  p.owner,
  p.observations,
  p.location_url,
  p.is_public,
  p.is_featured,
  p.created_at,
  u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name AS advisor_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property_interests pi WHERE pi.property_id = p.id) AS total_interesados,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processes pr WHERE pr.property_id = p.id) AS total_procesos
FROM properties p
JOIN users u ON u.id = p.advisor_id
WHERE (p.code = $1 OR p.address ILIKE $2)
  AND p.is_active = true
LIMIT 5;
